summary: User is experiencing fast data depletion.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: My data is disappearing, help me!

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I understand your concern, Baba Sikira. I see your current data balance is 1.5GB, and I remember you mentioned fast data depletion last week.

summary: User reported data depletion and requested help.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: E nle o, data mi ti tan, e jowo e ran mi lowo.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: E nle o Baba Sikira! I see your data is depleted. I'll apply a 100MB temporary boost for you right away.
